# PERF-144 positive: w.Write without setting Content-Length (but other headers set)
lang: go
file: PERF-144-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body := []byte("hello world")
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	_, _ = w.Write(body)
}
